---
title: "Stakeholder Engagement and Regional Priorities"
format: html
---

::: top-banner
:::

::: text-center
*Monday, June 9, 2026*
:::

::: text-center
*1:30 pm*
:::

::: text-center
*Facilitator: Dylan Glave*
:::

This working group is designed for participants focused on policy relevance, regional coordination, and the practical use of workshop outputs.

## Participants

| Name | Role | Institution |
|------|------|-------------|
| <a href="https://example.com" target="_blank">Dylan Glave</a> | Facilitator | MCSS |
| <a href="https://example.com" target="_blank">Christian/Marco</a> | Participant | CI Mesoamerica |
| <a href="https://example.com" target="_blank">Mariana Vera</a> | Participant | CI Ecuador |
| <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Fausto-Arias-Zumbado" target="_blank">Fausto Arias</a> | Participant | CI Costa Rica |
| <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/dami%C3%A1n-s-pardo-69b658a7/" target="_blank">Damian Pardo</a> | Participant | CI Colombia |
| <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/tito-navia-sol%C3%B3rzano-a1b701120/" target="_blank">Tito Navia</a> | Participant | GIZ |
| <a href="https://cpps-int.org/index.php/actividades-pda-m/60-quienes-somos/organigrama/213-directorio" target="_blank">Leonardo Marriaga</a> | Participant | CPPS |

## Focus areas

- Regional priorities
- Stakeholder engagement
- Policy and decision-support relevance
- Coordination across institutions
- Project next steps and regional usefulness
